title: KRS § 82.081 Corporate powers of cities.
text:
82.081 Corporate powers of cities. 
Each city shall constitute a corporation, with capacity to sue and be sued, to contract and 
be contracted with, to acquire and dispose of property, and to have a common seal and 
change it at pleasure or act without a seal. 
Effective: July 15, 1980 
History : Created 1980 Ky. Acts ch. 239, sec. 1, effective July 15, 1980.
caption: Corporate powers of cities.
